policy: small-scale runs not packaged as dotgit tarballs per feedback_evidence_packaging_policy_required
git_untracked_files: P*/runtime_repo/ (chaintape L4 + L4.E git repos; CAS uses git as backend; not packaged as dotgit tarballs at this scale)
reproducibility_protocol: re-run handover/tests/scripts/run_tb_18r_r7_evidence.sh against same git HEAD (8608bc3 + ship FINAL commit) with same MAX_TX=8, per_problem_timeout_s=360, condition=n1, model=deepseek-chat; expect 5/5 R4 invariant PASS under v4 extraction (handover/tests/scripts/tb_18r_postprocess_invariant_v4.sh).
